description_long: This is a rectangular, hard-shell storage box with a hinged lid, designed for secure containment and transport of items. The exterior is made of dark, durable plastic, featuring a textured surface for added grip and protection. The interior is lined with egg-crate foam padding, providing cushioning for delicate contents such as tools, equipment, or instruments. The lid is attached with robust hinges and features multiple raised tabs for easy opening and closing. There are no visible handles or locking mechanisms, giving it a streamlined, utilitarian appearance. The box is compact and stackable, suitable for placement in garages, workshops, or vehicle trunks.
description: A dark, hard-shell plastic storage box with a hinged lid and foam-padded interior, designed for secure and protective storage of items.
description_view_0: The box is shown closed on the left and open on the right, revealing the foam-padded interior and the raised tabs on the lid.
description_view_1: The box is viewed from the side, with the lid open and standing upright, highlighting the hinge mechanism and the depth of the interior.
description_view_2: The box is seen from the back and side, with the lid closed on the right and open on the left, showing the solid, unadorned exterior.
description_view_3: The box is viewed from above and at an angle, with the open lid clearly displaying the foam padding and the rectangular shape.
attribute_placement_location: garage, shelf, floor, vehicle trunk, stackable
